# Prohibited Products Policy

To keep customers safe and the marketplace trustworthy, certain products may not be listed or sold on ShopEase. Listing prohibited items may result in immediate removal and account action.

## Categories of Prohibited Items

- Illegal goods, stolen property, or counterfeit and replica items.
- Weapons, ammunition, explosives, and related accessories restricted by law.
- Recreational drugs, controlled substances, and associated paraphernalia.
- Hazardous or recalled materials that are unsafe for general sale.
- Products that infringe intellectual property (unauthorised brand or copyrighted goods).
- Adult or age-restricted content not permitted by marketplace rules.
- Live animals and regulated wildlife products.
- Items that facilitate fraud, hacking, or circumvention of security controls.

## Restricted Items

Some categories are allowed only with approval or documentation, for example:

- Health, supplement, and cosmetic products requiring compliance certificates.
- Electronics that must meet safety or certification standards.

Contact seller support to request approval before listing restricted items.

## Authenticity and Intellectual Property

- You must own or be authorised to sell every product you list.
- Selling counterfeit goods is strictly prohibited and may lead to permanent removal and legal referral.

## Reporting and Enforcement

- ShopEase reviews listings proactively and in response to reports.
- Confirmed violations can result in listing removal, payout holds, or account termination depending on severity and history.
